intro: Neurocallis lomarioides, also known as Neurocallis, is a perennial plant species native to South Africa, belonging to the family Asphodelaceae. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal activities that contribute to its potential health benefits in treating various ailments, such as wounds, skin infections, and respiratory issues.
